So, I mentioned in my introduction that you're on tour at the moment,
and you've been spending a lot of time this year on it.

What brought you back?

You can't put a tour and then change your mind, because tickets have been sold.

Now, I could give up TV and film to just do standup,
because I love it more than ever.

richest, most privileged, beautiful people in the world.

You've said a few things about trump.

People want to find some sort of justification.

And I think it loses something comedically.

what are we going to do about all these fucking immigrants?
